task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the ArkCase login screen with provided credentials or the ArkCase dashboard after successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the active complaint cases in ArkCase
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the ArkCase interface displaying a list, queue, or search results specifically for complaint cases.

task_completion.description: View the details of the active complaint cases to extract Case Number, Title, and Priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the case details or a detailed list view in ArkCase that exposes the Case Number, Title, and Priority for the complaint cases.

task_completion.description: Create or open the audit report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a terminal command (e.g., nano, vim, echo) or a graphical text editor opening/creating the file '~/audit_report.txt' (or '/home/ga/audit_report.txt').

task_completion.description: Write the summary report with the required case details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of 'audit_report.txt' containing exactly 4 lines (one for each case), with each line including a Case Number, the specific Case Title, and its Priority.

integrity.description: The agent extracted case details by interacting with the ArkCase web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent navigating the ArkCase GUI in a web browser. The agent should not be reading the ground truth file '/tmp/ground_truth_complaints.json' in the terminal to get the answers.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the report rather than using a script to copy the ground truth.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing or pasting the extracted case details into a text editor or terminal, rather than executing a script that copies data directly from the backend or ground truth files.

integrity.description: The agent only included the actual cases found in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final report should only contain the 4 specific cases mentioned in the privileged info, without hallucinated case numbers or titles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires finding exactly 4 active complaint cases in ArkCase. The verified case details are: (1) Title: 'Delayed Response to Records Request', Priority: High; (2) Title: 'Missing Attachments in Public Filing', Priority: Medium; (3) Title: 'Urgent Data Breach Notification Failure', Priority: Expedite; (4) Title: 'Minor Formatting Error in Published Report', Priority: Low. The final report must be saved at '/home/ga/audit_report.txt' and contain the Case Number, Title, and Priority for each of these 4 cases.
